title: Think Big Scholarships for international students | Current students | University of Bristol
text:
Think Big Scholarships for international students
Think Big is the University of Bristol’s flagship scholarship scheme, providing funding towards tuition fees for international students studying eligible undergraduate or postgraduate courses.
Eligibility
You can apply if you:
have already applied to start an eligible course in September 2026;
and you are classed as an overseas student for fee purposes.
You do not need to have received an offer to study before submitting an international scholarship application.
Eligible courses
Use the dropdowns to check if you are studying a course that allows to apply for a standard Think Big Scholarship. An asterisk (*) after a course name means there are multiple Think Big Scholarships available for your course.

How to apply
Apply using the
international scholarships online application form
.
By completing the application form, you will be considered for all the Think Big Scholarships for which you are eligible.
The application process is the same for all University of Bristol international scholarships. The
terms and conditions
are also the same.
You can find more details about this in our
guidance on how to apply for international scholarships
.
Deadline
Applications close at 10 am (UK time) on Friday 10 April 2026.
You will be contacted about the outcome of your application in May 2026.
